phase_A_results.expand_pypto: 33600x improvement (16384 AICPU dispatches → 1 materialize kernel). torch.expand().clone() workaround. PyPTO expand_clone only supports 1D.
phase_A_results.reduce_sum_fp32: FP32 accumulation via wrapper-level cast. 70/70 PASS (was 21/70). FP32→FP16→FP32 casts at wrapper level.
phase_A_results.transpose_perf_continued: 64×64 tile has +2.9% for B≥4 (baseline 32×32). Full vectorization blocked by no general transpose API.

phase_B_results.equal: 52 parsed files created. Torch msprof=11.54us, AscendC=49.98us, PyPTO=N/A
phase_B_results.not: 21 parsed files created. Torch msprof=10.68us, AscendC=8.16us, PyPTO=118.84us
phase_B_results.or: 21 parsed files created. Torch msprof=13.52us, AscendC=9.28us, PyPTO=204.52us
phase_B_results.where: 14 parsed files created. Torch msprof=11.62us, AscendC=248.38us, PyPTO=N/A
phase_B_results.parser_unified: All operators now use msprof. Event data retained for history.

phase_C_results.where_native: DT_BOOL kernel accepts uint8 data without .bool() conversion. Three viable approaches found.
phase_C_results.matmul_autotiling: TRUE framework limitation in PyPTO 0.2.0. ALL shapes fail auto-tiling (1×1 to 256×256). Manual set_cube_tile_shapes is the only path.

phase_D_results.scripts: tests/regression/run_regression.sh, check_parsed.py, check_comparison.py, check_dashboard.py, run_after_change.sh, regression_config.yaml

phase_F_results.features: 10 features implemented: profiler timeline, batch scaling, kernel timeline, skill trace, backend limitations, source hash, binary hash, current release, release history, operator detail page
